items.title: Queen of Pentacles
items.summary: “I’m a damsel, I’m in distress, I can handle this.” Hercules Queen of Wands represents confident creative independence. Soundtrack: HOT…
items.content_html:
“I’m a damsel, I’m in distress, I can handle this.”

Hercules

Queen of Wands represents confident creative independence.

Queen of Wands at a glance

Detail Meaning
Suit Wands
Rank Queen
Core meaning Confident creative independence
Suit theme action, ambition, creativity and momentum

Soundtrack: HOT TO GO! - Chappell Roan

Open the full Tarot Interviews playlist on Spotify

Upright meaning

  • Confidence
  • Independence
  • Warmth
  • Creativity
  • Charisma
  • Determination
  • Social confidence
  • Courage
  • Optimism
  • Attraction
  • Leadership
  • Knowing your worth

Reversed meaning

  • Jealousy
  • Insecurity
  • Selfishness
  • Demanding behaviour
  • Loss of confidence
  • Temper
  • Envy
  • Attention seeking
  • Burnout
  • Domination
  • Resentment
  • Creative block

Queen of Wands in a reading

Question Meaning
Love Confidence, independence or warmth in relationships
Career Confidence, creativity or a practical development at work
Money Independence or a need to consider jealousy
Feelings Confidence, independence and warmth
Advice Focus on confidence and avoid jealousy
Outcome The situation moves towards confidence
Yes or no Yes

Symbols in the Queen of Wands

Symbol Meaning
Suit of Wands Action, ambition, creativity and momentum
Number or court rank The stage or role represented by the queen
Figures and setting The lived situation shown in Pamela Colman Smith’s illustration

The Original Text by A. E. Waite (1910)

The Wands throughout this suit are always in leaf, as it is a suit of life and animation. Emotionally and otherwise, the Queen's personality corresponds to that of the King, but is more magnetic. Divinatory Meanings: A dark woman, countrywoman, friendly, chaste, loving, honourable. If the card beside her signifies a man, she is well disposed towards him; if a woman, she is interested in the Querent. Also, love of money, or a certain success in business. Reversed: Good, economical, obliging, serviceable. Signifies also-but in certain positions and in the neighbourhood of other cards tending in such directions-opposition, jealousy, even deceit and infidelity.

Waite’s meaning in plain English

Position Plain-English meaning
Upright A warm, loyal, honourable and confident woman
Reversed Helpful and practical qualities, but sometimes jealousy, opposition or deceit

Queen of Wands in one sentence

The Queen of Wands represents confident creative independence.

items.title: Nine of Pentacles
items.summary: “Why do we fall? So we can learn to pick ourselves up.” Batman Begins Nine of Wands represents resilience after…
items.content_html:
“Why do we fall? So we can learn to pick ourselves up.”

Batman Begins

Nine of Wands represents resilience after a difficult fight.

Nine of Wands at a glance

Detail Meaning
Suit Wands
Rank Nine
Core meaning Resilience after a difficult fight
Suit theme action, ambition, creativity and momentum

Soundtrack: midnight sun - Nilüfer Yanya

Open the full Tarot Interviews playlist on Spotify

Upright meaning

  • Resilience
  • Persistence
  • Boundaries
  • Last effort
  • Experience
  • Caution
  • Determination
  • Recovery
  • Protecting yourself
  • Preparedness
  • Endurance
  • Nearly there

Reversed meaning

  • Exhaustion
  • Paranoia
  • Defensiveness
  • Burnout
  • Giving up
  • Isolation
  • Fear from past experience
  • Weakening resolve
  • Repeated problems
  • Refusing help
  • Hypervigilance
  • No energy left

Nine of Wands in a reading

Question Meaning
Love Resilience, persistence or boundaries in relationships
Career Resilience, last effort or a practical development at work
Money Persistence or a need to consider exhaustion
Feelings Resilience, persistence and boundaries
Advice Focus on resilience and avoid exhaustion
Outcome The situation moves towards resilience
Yes or no Maybe / depends on the surrounding cards

Symbols in the Nine of Wands

Symbol Meaning
Suit of Wands Action, ambition, creativity and momentum
Number or court rank The stage or role represented by the nine
Figures and setting The lived situation shown in Pamela Colman Smith’s illustration

The Original Text by A. E. Waite (1910)

The figure leans upon his staff and has an expectant look, as if awaiting an enemy. Behind are eight other staves-erect, in orderly disposition, like a palisade. Divinatory Meanings: The card signifies strength in opposition. If attacked, the person will meet an onslaught boldly; and his build shews, that he may prove a formidable antagonist. With this main significance there are all its possible adjuncts-delay, suspension, adjournment. Reversed: Obstacles, adversity, calamity.

Waite’s meaning in plain English

Position Plain-English meaning
Upright Strength, resilience and readiness to face opposition
Reversed Obstacles, adversity and serious difficulty

Nine of Wands in one sentence

The Nine of Wands represents resilience after a difficult fight.
